text: South Australia Statutes Amendment (Personal Mobility Devices) Bill 2024 A Bill For An Act to amend the Motor Vehicles Act 1959 and the Road Traffic Act 1961. Contents Part 1—Preliminary 1 Short title 2 Commencement Part 2—Amendment of Motor Vehicles Act 1959 commencing on prescribed day 3 Amendment of section 5—Interpretation Part 3—Amendment of Motor Vehicles Act 1959 commencing by proclamation 4 Amendment of section 5—Interpretation 5 Amendment of section 116—Claim against nominal defendant where vehicle uninsured Part 4—Amendment of Road Traffic Act 1961 6 Amendment of section 5—Interpretation 7 Amendment of section 7—Drivers of trailers 8 Amendment of section 99A—Cyclists on footpaths etc to give warning 9 Amendment of section 162B—Safety helmets for riders of motor bikes and bicycles The Parliament of South Australia enacts as follows: Part 1—Preliminary 1—Short title This Act may be cited as the Statutes Amendment (Personal Mobility Devices) Act 2024. 2—Commencement (1) Subject to this section, this Act comes into operation on the day on which it is assented to by the Governor. (2) Part 2 of this Act is taken to have come into operation on the prescribed day. (3) Part 3 and Part 4 of this Act come into operation on a day to be fixed by proclamation. (4) In this section— prescribed day means the day on which the Statutes Amendment (Personal Mobility Devices) Bill 2024 was introduced in the House of Assembly. Part 2—Amendment of Motor Vehicles Act 1959 commencing on prescribed day 3—Amendment of section 5—Interpretation Section 5(1), definition of motor vehicle—after "part of the vehicle" insert: but does not include an electric personal transporter (within the meaning of the Road Traffic (Miscellaneous) Regulations 2014) that may be driven on or over a road in accordance with an approval of the Minister under section 161A of the Road Traffic Act 1961 Part 3—Amendment of Motor Vehicles Act 1959 commencing by proclamation 4—Amendment of section 5—Interpretation Section 5(1), definition of motor vehicle—delete "but does not include an electric personal transporter (within the meaning of the Road Traffic (Miscellaneous) Regulations 2014) that may be driven on or over a road in accordance with an approval of the Minister under section 161A of the Road Traffic Act 1961" and substitute: but does not include a device or vehicle of a kind excluded from this definition by the regulations 5—Amendment of section 116—Claim against nominal defendant where vehicle uninsured Section 116(1), definition of uninsured motor vehicle—after paragraph (e) insert: or (f) a motor vehicle of a class prescribed by the regulations for the purposes of this paragraph. Part 4—Amendment of Road Traffic Act 1961 6—Amendment of section 5—Interpretation (1) Section 5(1), definition of bicycle—delete the definition and substitute: bicycle means a device or vehicle prescribed by regulation as a bicycle for the purposes of this definition; (2) Section 5(1), definition of cycle—delete the definition (3) Section 5(1), definition of driver—after "bicycle" insert: , personal mobility device (4) Section 5(1), definition of motor vehicle—after "part of the vehicle" insert: but does not include a device or vehicle of a kind excluded from this definition by the regulations (5) Section 5(1)—after the definition of pedestrian insert: personal mobility device means a device or vehicle prescribed by regulation as a personal mobility device for the purposes of this definition; (6) Section 5(1), definition of rider—after "bicycle" first occurring insert: , personal mobility device (7) Section 5(1), definition of rider—after "bicycle" second occurring insert: or a personal mobility device (8) Section 5(1), definition of vehicle—after paragraph (b) insert: (ba) a personal mobility device; and 7—Amendment of section 7—Drivers of trailers Section 7—delete "motor vehicle or bicycle" and substitute: vehicle 8—Amendment of section 99A—Cyclists on footpaths etc to give warning (1) Section 99A, heading—delete "Cyclists" and substitute: Riders (2) Section 99A—after "bicycle" insert: or a personal mobility device 9—Amendment of section 162B—Safety helmets for riders of motor bikes and bicycles (1) Section 162B, heading—delete "of motor bikes and bicycles" (2) Section 162B(a)—delete "motor bikes or bicycles" and substitute: motor bikes, bicycles or personal mobility devices
